name: Anxiety Disorder - Diagnosis Code Query
description: Tests ability to find anxiety disorder patients by searching for diagnosis codes. Covers the PheKB anxiety algorithm case definition requiring 2+ anxiety-related ICD codes on different days. Patients may have generalized anxiety disorder, panic disorder, or unspecified anxiety disorder recorded as Condition resources.
prompt: Find all patients diagnosed with an anxiety disorder.

prompts.naive: Find all patients diagnosed with an anxiety disorder.
prompts.expert: I need to identify patients with anxiety disorder diagnoses in their records. Anxiety disorders encompass several distinct conditions that may be coded separately -- generalized anxiety disorder, panic disorder, and unspecified anxiety disorder are the most common. The query should search Condition resources and include SNOMED codes for all of these variants, since a patient chart may use any of them. In psychiatric phenotyping, the PheKB algorithm requires anxiety-related ICD codes from two or more visits on different days to establish a case, but for the FHIR query we need to first find all Condition resources with these codes.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with anxiety disorder diagnosis codes (SNOMED). These patients have Condition resources with anxiety disorder codes. The PheKB algorithm requires 2+ anxiety-related ICD codes on different days, but a single SNOMED-coded Condition query is the standard FHIR approach.
